description.en: Generate content for X.com (Twitter) based on your notes and ideas.
description.de: Generiere Inhalt für X.com (Twitter) basierend auf deinen Notizen und Ideen.
description.es: Genera contenido para X.com (Twitter) basado en tus notas e ideas.
description.fr: Générez du contenu pour X.com (Twitter) en fonction de vos notes et de vos idées.
description.ro: Generați conținut pentru X.com (Twitter) pe baza notelor și ideilor dvs.
description.it: Genera contenuti per X.com (Twitter) in base alle tue note e idee.

description.en: Creates an X.com post draft based on your notes
description.de: Erstellt einen X.com Post-Entwurf basierend auf deinen Notizen
description.es: Crea un borrador de publicación de X.com basado en tus notas.
description.fr: Crée un brouillon de publication X.com basé sur vos notes
description.ro: Creează o schiță de postare X.com pe baza notelor tale
description.it: Crea una bozza del post X.com in base alle tue note

actions.prompt: Create a x.com post draft based on the following notes: {{NOTES}}

description.en: Your notes, ideas, or content to turn into an X.com post draft
description.de: Deine Notizen, Ideen oder Inhalte, die in einen X.com Post-Entwurf umgewandelt werden sollen
description.es: Tus notas, ideas o contenido para convertirlos en un borrador de publicación de X.com
description.fr: Vos notes, idées ou contenus à transformer en brouillon de publication X.com
description.ro: Notele, ideile sau conținutul dvs. pentru a le transforma într-o schiță de postare X.com
description.it: Le tue note, idee o contenuti da trasformare in una bozza di post X.com
